chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1235 of 2024. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A No.5637/24. 3. For hearing of main case. 28.08.2025. Mr. Aayatullah Khuwaja, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G Sindh. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* Through the Petition in hand, the Petitioner seeks Choukri Survey of land admeasuring 46-10 acres bearing S.No.700, situated in Deh Kalo Kohar, Tapa Kalo Koharm Taluka Thano Bula Khan. Mr. Khuwaja, present on behalf of Petitioner submits that initially the concerned authorities were reluctant to receive an application from Petitioner for Choukri Survey, however, subsequently such application was received by Respondent No.4/Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Thano Bula Khan which is available at page #31 but the same Application is still not decided and pending since July, 2024. He further submits that he would be satisfied if the Application pending before Respondent No.4 is decided regarding Choukri Survey. Learned A.A.G submits that the Application of Petitioner would be decided in accordance with law and the order passed by this Court would be complied with in letter & sprit. In view of above circumstances, the Petition in hand is hereby disposed of with directions to Respondents to decide the pending Application of Petitioner within two months from today in accordance with law. Office to communicate the copy of order with learned A.A.G Sindh & concerned quarters immediately. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
